title: New AI system reduces pathologist workload while maintaining diagnostic accuracy
description: Artificial intelligence could make cancer diagnosis safer and fairer by learning when to defer to human pathologists without overloading them, according to researchers from the University of Surrey and Monash University.
content:
Artificial intelligence could make cancer diagnosis safer and fairer by learning when to defer to human pathologists without overloading them, according to researchers from the University of Surrey and Monash University.

title: PC, console gaming to grow despite AI-driven chip crunch
description: THE global PC and console gaming sector is expected to steadily grow in the upcoming years, research firm Newzoo said on Thursday, despite artificial intelligence-driven demand for high-end memory chips potentially driving up prices.
content:

title: Chinese banks boost loans to tech sector as Beijing ramps up AI push
description: CHINESE lenders plan to steer more money toward technology and innovation-oriented firms, bankers say, responding to Beijing’s pledge to aggressively adopt artificial intelligence (AI) throughout the economy and dominate emerging sectors.

title: CU to consider new policy on AI
description: The University of Colorado is developing a new policy surrounding artificial intelligence as it prepares to roll out a CU-controlled version of ChatGPT effective March 31.
content:

description: A group of Pittsburgh-area high school students challenged each other Friday to think about the future of artificial intelligence. title: Beyond Software: The Physical Buildout Behind AI Expansion
description: Artificial intelligence is often framed as a software race, shaped by models, chips, and product launches. That view is incomplete. Recent reporting and industry research show that AI growth is now tied just as tightly to power access, construction timelines, and industrial supply chains as it is to code.
